mapper.insert: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO tb_biz_task_execution () VALUES ()
INSERT INTO tb_biz_task_execution () VALUES () ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_biz_task_execution WHERE state IN ('PENDING','RETRY_WAIT') AND (next_attempt_time IS NULL OR next_attempt_time <= #{now}) ORDER BY next_attempt_time ASC,planned_at ASC,execution_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

if.test: condition.ownerType != null and condition.ownerType != '' and condition.ownerId != null and condition.ownerId != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM tb_biz_task_execution e INNER JOIN tb_biz_task t ON t.task_id=e.task_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY e.planned_at ASCDESC,e.execution_id DESC
ORDER BY e.create_time ASCDESC,e.execution_id DESC
ORDER BY e.state ASCDESC,e.execution_id DESC
ORDER BY e.started_at ASCDESC,e.execution_id DESC
ORDER BY e.finished_at ASCDESC,e.execution_id DESC
ORDER BY e.execution_id ASCDESC
ORDER BY e.planned_at DESC,e.execution_id DESC

SELECT FROM tb_biz_task_execution e INNER JOIN tb_biz_task t ON t.task_id=e.task_id WHERE e.execution_id=#{condition.executionId}
LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_biz_task_execution SET state='RUNNING',claim_token=#{claimToken},worker_node=#{workerNode},lease_until=#{leaseUntil}, heartbeat_at=#{now},started_at=COALESCE(started_at,#{now}),attempt_count=attempt_count+1, update_time=#{now},version=version+1 WHERE execution_id=#{executionId} AND version=#{version} AND state IN ('PENDING','RETRY_WAIT') AND (next_attempt_time IS NULL OR next_attempt_time <= #{now})
UPDATE tb_biz_task_execution SET state=#{toState},update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE execution_id=#{executionId} AND version=#{version} AND state IN #{state}

UPDATE tb_biz_task_execution SET state='RETRY_WAIT',next_attempt_time=#{nextAttemptTime},failure_code=#{failureCode}, failure_message=#{failureMessage},retryable=1,claim_token=NULL,worker_node=NULL,lease_until=NULL, update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE execution_id=#{executionId} AND state='RUNNING' AND claim_token=#{claimToken}

UPDATE tb_biz_task_execution SET state='MISSED',finished_at=#{finishedAt},failure_code=#{failureCode},failure_message=#{failureMessage}, retryable=0,next_attempt_time=NULL,update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE execution_id=#{executionId} AND version=#{version} AND state='PENDING'

UPDATE tb_biz_task_execution SET state=#{targetState},next_attempt_time=#{nextAttemptTime},finished_at=#{finishedAt}, failure_code=#{failureCode},failure_message=#{failureMessage}, retryable=CASE WHEN #{targetState}='RETRY_WAIT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, claim_token=NULL,worker_node=NULL,lease_until=NULL,update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE execution_id=#{executionId} AND version=#{version} AND state='RUNNING' AND claim_token=#{claimToken} AND lease_until IS NOT NULL AND lease_until<#{expiredBefore} AND #{targetState} IN ('RETRY_WAIT','FAILED')

UPDATE tb_biz_task_execution SET state=#{terminalState},finished_at=#{finishedAt},result_ref_type=#{resultRefType}, result_ref_id=#{resultRefId},result_summary=#{resultSummary},failure_code=#{failureCode}, failure_message=#{failureMessage},retryable=#{retryable},claim_token=NULL,worker_node=NULL, lease_until=NULL,update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE execution_id=#{executionId} AND state='RUNNING' AND claim_token=#{claimToken} AND #{terminalState} IN ('SUCCEEDED','FAILED','CANCELLED')

UPDATE tb_biz_task_execution SET state='SUCCEEDED',finished_at=#{finishedAt},progress_current=#{progressCurrent}, progress_total=#{progressTotal},progress_message=#{progressMessage}, progress_revision=#{progressRevision},result_ref_type=#{resultRefType},result_ref_id=#{resultRefId}, result_summary=#{resultSummary},failure_code=NULL,failure_message=NULL,retryable=0, next_attempt_time=NULL,claim_token=NULL,worker_node=NULL,lease_until=NULL, update_time=#{updateTime},version=version+1 WHERE execution_id=#{executionId} AND state='RUNNING' AND claim_token=#{claimToken}
